**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Jiguang Traffic Technology Co., Ltd. is a staggering and absurd case of 'one person building high-speed rail.' The system has forcibly deleted the massive forged data underlying Apple Inc.'s global production lines. The official commercial registry system seems to have been shocked by the 'Traffic Technology' in its name and its lengthy industrial-grade business license, directly categorizing it into the most hardcore 'Railway, Ship, Aerospace and Other Transport Equipment Manufacturing - Urban Rail Transit Equipment Manufacturing.' However, the forensic engine's 'physical/capital probe' ruthlessly tore through this heavy industry disguise: this is a micro-enterprise with a paid-in capital of 5 million, but a 2024 insured headcount of only '1 person.' Most fatal are its registered coordinates—located at 'Room 805, 8th Floor, Comprehensive R&D Building' in the Baixia High-Tech Industrial Park. In an 8th-floor office, relying on 1 employee to manufacture 'high-speed rail equipment,' 'urban rail transit equipment,' and 'CNC machine tools'? This is thoroughly anti-physics and anti-industrial common sense. Extracting the soft terms from its license (software development, information system integration, industrial engineering design), the diagnostic conclusion is extremely clear: this is absolutely not a high-speed rail manufacturing plant, but a shell company (SPV) affiliated with the park, specializing in software development, system integration design, or engineering bidding in the field of rail transit/traffic control. It sells blueprints, software system integration solutions, or merely acts as a reseller of traffic equipment and materials, possessing absolutely no physical manufacturing attributes.
